kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.msg: Response: {"success":true,"statusCode":200,"message":"GET_DATA_SUCCEEDED","totalItems":2,"nextPage":null,"previousPage":null,"currentPage":1,"totalPages":1,"limit":10,"data":[{"id":889,"userprofile":{"first_name":"Alex","last_name":"Pham","gender":"FEMALE","dob":"2000-06-10","avatar":"https://panda-sgp-public-storage.s3.amazonaws.com/media/files/2025/7/24/581080avaa.png","address":"103 NW 167nd Avenue Miami, FL 33125","email":"alex.ben@yopmail.com","phone_number":"3693256983","user_code":"alexstaff","role":"STAFF"},"organization":{"id":403,"name":"Ben Store"},"is_active":true,"created_at":"2025-07-24T04:45:29.070097Z"},{"id":888,"userprofile":{"first_name":"Kira","last_name":"Vo","gender":"FEMALE","dob":"2000-12-21","avatar":"https://panda-sgp-public-storage.s3.amazonaws.com/media/files/2025/7/24/499333tech20.jpg","address":"190 NW 123nd Avenue Miami, FL 33125","email":"kira.ben@yopmail.com","phone_number":"9878989000","user_code":"kirastaff","role":"STAFF"},"organization":{"id":403,"name":"Ben Store"},"is_active":true,"created_at":"2025-07-24T04:43:49.662378Z"}]}

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Sending key(s) ('ENTER',) to xpath=//input[@placeholder='Search by User ID, User Name, Email, Phone Number...'] element.
